case_title: KAREN FUFKIN VOLLMAYER VS. CASE HOME FINANCE LLC. et al.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
CASE HOME FINANCE LLC. IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-16-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-18-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WANTS TO FILE AN AMENDED CLAIM TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME; PLAINTIFF TO SERVE THE DEFENDANT'S PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT ON THE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: NOVEMBER 20,2013).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN C. LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SUSAN RAMIREZ--HOME LENDING RESEARCH OFFICER. DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOLLMAYER, KAREN FUFKIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $625.00, DEFENDANT TO REMOVE REPORTING OF LATE PAYMENTS IN JUNE, AUG & DEC 2011. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
